cases.name: extracts all fields from clean intro
cases.input: Hi, this is John Smith from Acme Corp (john@acme.io). We need pricing for 50 seats by Friday.

cases.name: returns null for missing fields
cases.input: Looking for a demo of your platform.

cases.name: detects high urgency from frustration
cases.input: URGENT — production is down and we're losing money. Need help now.

cases.name: low urgency for casual tone
cases.input: Hey, just curious about partnership opportunities. No rush.

cases.name: anti-hallucination: never fabricates missing email
cases.input: Hi, I am Jane and I want a demo.
